reviews.comment:
Tuvimos una demora de 30' para calentar unos sandwiches... Lamentablemente.. la atención es excelente tanto en la full como los playeros.

(Translated by Google)
We had a 30-minute delay in heating up some sandwiches... Unfortunately... the service is excellent both at the full and beach restaurants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURQaGF2c01BEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar con estacionamiento al entrar a la habitación. Excelente blanqueria. Buen desayuno al estilo de YPF FULL.  Buen wi fi. Agua MINERAL de cortesía. Muy bien servicio de playa y muchísimas amabilidades de todo el personal. Buen cuidado de paisajismo y vegetación.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent location with parking right outside your room. Excellent linens. A hearty YPF-style breakfast. Good Wi-Fi. Complimentary mineral water. Excellent beach service and extremely friendly staff. Well-maintained landscaping and vegetation.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURQMXBDOGhBRRAB
